name: 𝙾𝚙𝚎𝚛𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝙿𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚎𝚙𝚝 | Welcome To Derry Military AU
description:
Any POV | User!enlisted in military AU

!Open-prompt!

Military AU! User is apart of the military in Derry and is one of few people to have seen Pennywise and lived to tell the tale. Includes General Shaw, Major Leroy Hanland, Dick Hallorann, and of course Pennywise!

!TRIGGER WARNINGS!-

[Possible gore, possible trauma, mentions of war, possible disturbing imagery, possible murder, cannibalism]

REQUESTS ARE OPEN

REQUEST RULES:

- Please be nice

- No scenario with under 18+ characters(you can ask for them to be aged up!)

- I can do multiple characters(Anybody in Derry), but don't request anything that doesn't relate to IT(Not the character but the entire story, yk?).

- Be creative!

Tested= Yes

Request= Yes

If there is any issue with the bot please report it!
creator: LuvBirdz
